crypto.title: Encryption & Decryption Tools
crypto.algorithmDesc: This tool supports various international standards and Chinese national cryptographic algorithms, including asymmetric encryption, symmetric encryption, and hashing

algorithmSelector.rsaDesc: Classic public-key encryption algorithm, widely used for data encryption and digital signatures
algorithmSelector.eccDesc: Elliptic curve encryption algorithm, providing comparable security to RSA with shorter keys
algorithmSelector.ed25519Desc: Efficient digital signature algorithm based on twisted Edwards curves
algorithmSelector.sm2Desc: Chinese national commercial cryptographic algorithm for digital signatures and key exchange
algorithmSelector.aesDesc: Advanced Encryption Standard, widely used symmetric encryption algorithm
algorithmSelector.chacha20Desc: High-performance stream cipher algorithm, suitable for mobile devices
algorithmSelector.sm4Desc: Chinese national commercial cryptographic algorithm, block cipher
algorithmSelector.sm3Desc: Chinese national commercial cryptographic algorithm, 256-bit cryptographic hash
algorithmSelector.blake3Desc: Modern hash function with excellent performance and security
